headline: Costco’s Japan Success Highlights Membership Model And Global Growth Potential
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) has grown Japan into its second-largest market after North America. The company is gaining traction in Japan by combining bulk warehouse clubs with locally sourced products. Membership remains at the core of Costco's Japan model, mirroring its approach in the United States. For investors who mainly track U.S. performance, Japan is becoming an important part of the Costco story. The warehouse retailer is known for its paid membership model, limited product...
